title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Setting Up NOWPayments Webhooks — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Kenya, selling ebooks, music, and courses online, but every time you try to process payments, the payment gateways deny you access due to banking restrictions or geographic limitations. This leaves you stuck, unable to get paid for your hard work and talent. The frustration and lost income are demotivating, making you wonder if your creative endeavors are worth the struggle. But what if there was a way to bypass these restrictions and start earning money from your digital products, hassle-free? That's exactly what we're going to explore in this guide – setting up NOWPayments webhooks to automate your payment and delivery pipeline.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason this method works when everything else fails is that it doesn't rely on traditional payment gateways like PayPal or Stripe, which often block access to creators from restricted countries. By using NOWPayments and its webhooks, you can create a direct connection between your customers and your digital products, without needing to navigate the complex and often limiting world of payment processing. This setup also allows you to control the delivery of your products, so you can ensure that your customers receive their purchases exactly as intended, every time. By automating this process, you can significantly reduce the risk of payment failures and lost sales, giving you peace of mind and time to focus on creating more value for your customers.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin setting up NOWPayments webhooks, you'll need a few essential tools. First, create a NOWPayments account, which is free and easy to sign up for. Next, make sure you have a digital product ready for sale, such as an ebook or a course. You'll also need a website or platform to host your product, like the Core Shop Engine, which provides a seamless and secure way to sell digital goods. Finally, familiarize yourself with the NOWPayments dashboard and its webhooks feature, which will be the core of your automated payment and delivery pipeline.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline involves several key steps. First, create a new webhook in your NOWPayments dashboard, specifying the events you want to trigger, such as payment receipt or order completion. Next, connect this webhook to your website or platform, using the provided API key. Then, configure your digital product to be delivered automatically when a payment is processed, using the Core Shop Engine's automated delivery feature. Finally, test your pipeline by simulating a payment and checking that the delivery is successful.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up and tested, it's time to go live and make your first sale. Promote your digital product to your target audience, using social media, email marketing, and other channels. When a customer makes a purchase, the NOWPayments webhook will trigger, and your Core Shop Engine will automatically deliver the product. Monitor your sales and customer feedback to refine your process and improve the customer experience. With each sale, you'll gain valuable insights and confidence in your automated payment and delivery pipeline.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As you continue to sell digital products and receive payments, you can scale your system by adding more products, customers, and sales channels. Use the NOWPayments analytics to track your performance and make data-driven decisions about how to optimize your pipeline. You can also use the Core Shop Engine's features to offer bundles, discounts, and other promotions to incentivize sales and increase revenue. By continuously refining and expanding your automated payment and delivery pipeline, you'll be able to grow your business and reach new heights of success.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Don't worry, you don't need to be a tech expert to set up NOWPayments webhooks. The process is straightforward and well-documented, and you can always reach out to the NOWPayments support team for help. Just follow the step-by-step guide outlined in this article, and you'll be up and running in no time. With NOWPayments and the Core Shop Engine, you can finally start selling digital products and getting paid, without the hassle and risk of traditional payment gateways.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

This guide is just the beginning. To maximize your success, explore other topics related to digital product sales, such as marketing, customer service, and product development. You can also use the Core Shop Engine to sell physical products, merchandise, or services, expanding your business into new areas. By continuously learning and adapting, you'll be able to stay ahead of the competition and achieve your goals as a digital creator.
Your Action Checklist

To set up NOWPayments webhooks and start selling digital products, follow these concrete action steps: Create a NOWPayments account and explore its dashboard and webhooks feature. Set up a website or platform using the Core Shop Engine, and configure it to work with NOWPayments. Create a new webhook in your NOWPayments dashboard, specifying the events you want to trigger. Connect this webhook to your website or platform using the API key. Test your pipeline by simulating a payment and checking that the delivery is successful. Go live and promote your digital product to your target audience. Monitor your sales and customer feedback to refine your process and improve the customer experience.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
